Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Night Wheel Valley]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Night Wheel Valley is a sacred training ground of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Night Wheel Valley is a location where training can strengthen sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Night Wheel Valley is a location filled with valuable treasures and great opportunity but also great danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Night Wheel Valley is a location where resources are gathered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Night Wheel Valley is shrouded in shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — The Akura family has owned Night Wheel Valley for generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Night Wheel Valley has an overwhelming shadow aura that suppresses spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The darkness of the Night Wheel Valley settled around them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos is standing in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Night Wheel Valley contains a castle erected by King Dakata.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Night Wheel Valley contains sacred grounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Night Wheel Valley is always full of rustling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Lights flashed in the darkness of the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Opening Copper sight in the Night Wheel Valley causes pain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Empire's border in the Night Wheel Valley collapsed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The Night Wheel Valley has forests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Fisher Gesha spent time in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Sensing aura is easier in the Night Wheel Valley than with his current treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Night Wheel Valley is a location Lindon and Yerin can go to for advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Night Wheel Valley is a place that can be seized and held.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura family regularly harvests the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Night Wheel Valley contains a vault used for training or Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Night Wheel Valley is a location featured on a map in Charity's letter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Some of the newest Underlords advanced in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Night Wheel Valley is a location where the aura strength feels like diving into an ocean of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — The Night Wheel Valley makes it harder to see or sense things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — The power in the Akura vault could overshadow the Night Wheel Valley many times over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The shadow aura of the Night Wheel Valley restricts Eithan's sight.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The spiritual weight of Moongrave reminds Lindon of the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The competition in the Night Wheel Valley caused the Blackflame Empire to double its Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Charity set up gates to the Night Wheel Valley for Lindon's Empire.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Night Wheel Valley is a location where sacred artists from the Blackflame Empire were transported.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Charity keeps a storehouse at the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Seishen Kingdom has Underlords after their time in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Night Wheel Valley is a location where Daji previously used his armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon experienced a loss of senses in the Night Wheel Valley.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Night Wheel Valley is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity previously expanded a doorway in Night Wheel Valley.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Seishen Kingdom lost a competition for Night Wheel Valley.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
